name: Fried Fish with Puerto Rican Sauce (Mojo Isle
recipeIngredient: Pimentos: 4 oz can, cut into tiny slices in their juice
Fish slices: 4 lb white meat fish "Chillo"
Garlic: 4 large cloves, peeled and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by mixing ingredients (A) and cooking over medium heat about 1 hour.
2. When the sauce is nearly done, season the fish with salt included in B. Lightly cover each piece of fish with flour.
3. In a frying pan, heat oil and garlic over moderate heat. Brown the garlic, then add the fish slices. Cook on both sides until browned, reduce heat to low, and cook for 15 minutes or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork. Fry remaining fish in batches using the same method.
4. Place the fried fish in a mold and cover with hot sauce. Let it stand for 5 minutes before serving.
